title: LiveContainer
description: LiveContainer allows running iOS apps natively via JIT, using dynamic code signing and injection without a jailbreak.

title: Dopamine
description: A rootless semi-untethered jailbreak for iOS 15.0 - 16.5.1 (arm64e) and iOS 15.0 - 16.7.15 (arm64).

title: TrollInstallerX
description: Supports iOS 14.0 - 16.6.1 (arm64/arm64e) to install TrollStore using different methods depending on the device/OS.

title: Lara
description: Multi-tool for iOS 15.0-18.1. Features: Font Overwrite, File Manager (Full Disk r/w), 3 App Bypass, Performance tweaks and more.
